name: Daqi-2 (AEMS)
location_str: Launch Area 94 (SLS-2 / 603) @ Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: Daqi-2 (DQ-2), also known as the Atmospheric Environment Monitoring Satellite/AEMS, is the second of follow-on series of Chinese satellites to the GF-5 series for high resolution atmospheric environment monitoring of greenhouse gases, such as atmospheric aerosol and carbon dioxide.
rocket_fact: The Kármán line at 100km (62 miles) altitude is widely accepted as the boundary where space begins.
